description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:4.4.1-jdk8-alpine Docker image, set GRADLE_OPTS to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false, and add a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle. Define two stages, build and test. In the build stage add a build job that caches assignment-*/build and assignment-*/.gradle with a push policy keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and runs `gradle --build-cache assemble`. In the test stage add a manual funtest:a1 job that pulls the same cache and runs `gradle -q :assignment-1:run < assignment-1/testcases/in1.txt`, `gradle -q :assignment-1:run < assignment-1/testcases/in2.txt`, `gradle -q :assignment-1:run < assignment-1/testcases/in3.txt`, `gradle -q :assignment-1:run < assignment-1/testcases/in4.txt`, and `gradle -q :assignment-1:run < assignment-1/testcases/in5.txt`. Also add test:a1, test:a2, test:a3, and test:a4 jobs that each pull their respective assignment-N/build and assignment-N/.gradle caches, run `gradle :assignment-N:check`, always publish artifacts named with ${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}-${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}-Reports (or A2Reports, A3Reports, A4Reports) containing assignment-N/build/reports, expire in 12 weeks, and are excluded from runs on the master branch of DDP2-CSUI/assignment.
